# Quriov MCP installation and validation index

README.md
  Human overview, capability matrix, security notice, and fixed public contract.

AGENTS.md
  Mandatory safety, scope, secret-handling, immutability, and verification rules.

install-manifest.json
  Release metadata, allowed endpoint, client support levels, and SHA-256 locks.

contract.lock.json
  Non-authoritative snapshot of the fixed scope, endpoint, Registry identity,
  and exact eight-tool public contract.

recipes/codex.md
  Codex trusted-agent install, verify, doctor, uninstall, and revoke procedure.

recipes/claude-code.md
  Claude Code trusted-agent install, verify, doctor, uninstall, and revoke procedure.

recipes/cursor.md
  Cursor AI-assisted setup and cleanup. Automatic installation is unverified.

bin/quriov-mcp-doctor.mjs
  Read-only initialize, exact tools/list, and redacted get_account validation.

test/quriov-mcp-doctor.test.mjs
  Doctor protocol, redaction, fail-closed, and argument-safety tests.

SECURITY.md
  Private vulnerability reporting route and public distribution threat model.

https://quriovai.com/mcp
  Human-facing capability, key creation, revoke, and onboarding page.

https://quriovai.com/mcp/v1
  The only allowed remote MCP endpoint. Requires a revocable scope=mcp key.
